title: lithophragma parviflorum
intro: Lithophragma parviflorum, also known as small-flowered woolly meadowfoam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cleomaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithophragma parviflorum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Lithophragma parviflorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
